# Fanvue API Documentation

## Docs

- [Fanvue Developer Platform](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/welcome.mdx): The infrastructure for high-scale agencies and AI-first creator tools.
- [Welcome](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/introduction/welcome.mdx)
- [Quick Start](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/introduction/quick-start.mdx)
- [Overview](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/authentication/overview.mdx)
- [Quick Start](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/authentication/quick-start.mdx)
- [Implementation Guide](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/authentication/implementation-guide.mdx)
- [Scopes](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/authentication/scopes.mdx)
- [Rate Limits](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/authentication/rate-limits.mdx)
- [Working With Rate Limits](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/authentication/working-with-rate-limits.mdx)
- [Overview](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/versions/overview.mdx)
- [Management Strategies](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/versions/management-strategies.mdx)
- [Docs For Your LLM](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/build-with-ai/docs-for-your-llm.mdx)
- [Example Chatbots](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/tutorials/example-chatbots.mdx)
- [Multipart Media Upload](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/tutorials/multipart-media-upload.mdx)
- [Sending Mass Messages](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/tutorials/sending-mass-messages.mdx)
- [Security Guidelines](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/tutorials/security.mdx)
- [n8n](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/integrations/n-8-n.mdx)
- [MCP (AI Assistants)](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/integrations/mcp-ai-assistants.mdx)
- [Meta Pixel](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/integrations/meta-pixel.mdx)
- [Webhooks Overview](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/webhooks/webhooks/webhooks-overview.mdx)
- [Message Received](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/webhooks/webhooks/message-received.mdx)
- [Message Read](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/webhooks/webhooks/message-read.mdx)
- [New Follower](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/webhooks/webhooks/new-follower.mdx)
- [New Subscriber](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/webhooks/webhooks/new-subscriber.mdx)
- [Purchase Received](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/webhooks/webhooks/purchase-received.mdx)
- [Tip Received](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/webhooks/webhooks/tip-received.mdx)
- [Changelog](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/changelog.mdx)

## API Docs

- Reference > Users [Get current user](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/users/get-current-user.mdx)
- Reference > Chats [Get list of chats](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chats/list-chats.mdx)
- Reference > Chats [Get unread chats, messages, and notifications count](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chats/get-unread-chats-count.mdx)
- Reference > Chats [Get media from a chat](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chats/list-media.mdx)
- Reference > Chats [Create a new chat](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chats/create-chat.mdx)
- Reference > Chats [Get online statuses for multiple users](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chats/get-batch-statuses.mdx)
- Reference > Chats [Update chat properties](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chats/update-chat.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Messages [Get messages from a chat](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-messages/list-messages.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Messages [Send a message](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-messages/send-message.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Messages [Send a mass message](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-messages/send-mass-message.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Messages [Delete a message](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-messages/delete-message.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Templates [Get list of template messages](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-templates/list-template-messages.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Templates [Get a single template message](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-templates/get-template-message.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Smart Lists [Get smart lists](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-smart-lists/get-smart-lists.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Smart Lists [Get smart list members](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-smart-lists/get-smart-list-members.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Custom Lists [Get custom lists](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-custom-lists/get-custom-lists.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Custom Lists [Get custom list members](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-custom-lists/get-custom-list-members.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Custom Lists [Create a custom list](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-custom-lists/create-custom-list.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Custom Lists [Rename a custom list](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-custom-lists/update-custom-list.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Custom Lists [Delete a custom list](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-custom-lists/delete-custom-list.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Custom List Members [Add members to a custom list](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-custom-list-members/add-members-to-custom-list.mdx)
- Reference > Chat Custom List Members [Remove a member from a custom list](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/chat-custom-list-members/remove-member-from-custom-list.mdx)
- Reference > Posts [Get list of posts](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/posts/get-posts.mdx)
- Reference > Posts [Get post by UUID](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/posts/get-post-by-uuid.mdx)
- Reference > Posts [Get tips for a post](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/posts/get-post-tips.mdx)
- Reference > Posts [Get likes for a post](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/posts/get-post-likes.mdx)
- Reference > Posts [Get comments for a post](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/posts/get-post-comments.mdx)
- Reference > Posts [Create a new post](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/posts/create-post.mdx)
- Reference > Creators [Get followers](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/creators/list-followers.mdx)
- Reference > Creators [Get subscribers](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/creators/list-subscribers.mdx)
- Reference > Insights [Get earnings data](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/insights/get-earnings.mdx)
- Reference > Insights [Get top-spending fans](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/insights/get-top-spenders.mdx)
- Reference > Insights [Get subscribers count](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/insights/get-subscribers.mdx)
- Reference > Insights [Get fan insights](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/insights/get-fan-insights.mdx)
- Reference > Media [Get user's media list](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/media/get-user-media.mdx)
- Reference > Media [Get media by UUID](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/media/get-user-media-by-uuid.mdx)
- Reference > Media [Create multipart upload session](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/media/create-upload-session.mdx)
- Reference > Media [Get signed URL for upload part](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/media/get-upload-part-url.mdx)
- Reference > Media [Complete upload session](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/media/complete-upload-session.mdx)
- Reference > Tracking Links [List tracking links](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/tracking-links/list-tracking-links.mdx)
- Reference > Tracking Links [Create a tracking link](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/tracking-links/create-tracking-link.mdx)
- Reference > Tracking Links [Delete a tracking link](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/tracking-links/delete-tracking-link.mdx)
- Reference > Vault [List vault folders](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/vault/list-vault-folders.mdx)
- Reference > Vault [Create a vault folder](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/vault/create-vault-folder.mdx)
- Reference > Vault [Get vault folder details](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/vault/get-vault-folder.mdx)
- Reference > Vault [Delete vault folder](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/vault/delete-vault-folder.mdx)
- Reference > Vault [Rename vault folder](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/vault/rename-vault-folder.mdx)
- Reference > Vault [List media in folder](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/vault/list-vault-folder-media.mdx)
- Reference > Vault [Add media to folder](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/vault/attach-media-to-vault-folder.mdx)
- Reference > Vault [Remove media from folder](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/vault/detach-media-from-vault-folder.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get agency creators](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-creators.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [List team members](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-team-members.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Update team member](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/update-team-member.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get creator followers](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-creator-followers.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get creator subscribers](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-creator-subscribers.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get chats of a creator](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-creator-chats.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Create new chat as creator](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/create-creator-chat.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get creator's smart lists](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/get-creator-smart-lists.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get creator's smart list members](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/get-creator-smart-list-members.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get creator's custom lists](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/get-creator-custom-lists.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get creator's custom list members](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/get-creator-custom-list-members.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Send a mass message as creator](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/send-creator-mass-message.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Send a message as creator](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/send-creator-message.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get messages between a creator and a user](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-creator-messages.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get media from a creator's chat](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-creator-chat-media.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get earnings data for a creator](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/get-creator-earnings.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get top-spending fans for a creator](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/get-creator-top-spenders.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get subscribers count for a creator](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/get-creator-subscribers.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get creator's media list](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/get-creator-media.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get creator's media by UUID](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/get-creator-media-by-uuid.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Create multipart upload session for creator](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/create-creator-upload-session.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Get signed URL for upload part](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/get-creator-upload-part-url.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Complete creator's upload session](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/complete-creator-upload-session.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Create a new post for a creator](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/create-creator-post.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [List creator's tracking links](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-creator-tracking-links.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Create a tracking link for a creator](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/create-creator-tracking-link.mdx)
- Reference > Agencies [Delete a tracking link for a creator](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/delete-creator-tracking-link.mdx)
- Reference [Update a creator's chat with a user](https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/update-creator-chat.mdx)
